prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第66名，近年排名稳定在65–76区间，属财经类头部院校；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无 重大负面事件；抖音综合热度排名第92、评价一般，短视频曝光量处于中游水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；应用经济学A+（全国顶尖）、工商管理A、统 计学A-，财经学科实力突出；统计学类、金融学类等专业对理科考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业2024年社会热度为分化观望，计算机/电子信 息类持续高热推荐；本省2026年物理类考生约206,500人，较2025年172,468人增加约19.7%，竞争加剧；西南财经大学位于四川成都，属西部财经重镇，对陕西考生有一定地域吸引力。 综合历年位次波动回稳趋势、2026年计划大幅扩招（+46%）远超本省物理类考生增幅（+19.7%）的净竞争缓解效应，以及财经类学科对理科考生的稳定吸引力， 在2025年基准11374名基础上预计位次前移（数字减小）；预测最低位次约14310名，区间13810–14810名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间13810–14810名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<13810名）可重点冲击一档的会计学（注册会计师方向 ）和计算机科学与技术（拔尖实验班）；位次接近区间上限（>14810名）应以三档的财政学类、金融学类为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 6295 → 7301 → 14944 (sharp decline in 2023) → 10904 → 11374, with significant fluctuations; in 2023, due to the cooling of finance and economics, there was a sharp drop, and from 2024 to 2025, it gradually stabilized; the 2025 baseline is approximately 11374; the provincial science group enrollment plan was 26 in 2021 → 28 in 2022 → 25 in 2023 → 35 in 2024 → 37 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 54, a substantial expansion of about 46% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 66th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 65–76 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier finance and economics institutions; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative incidents; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 92nd, with average reviews, and short video exposure is at a mid-level, showing no clear signs of increased application attention; Applied Economics is A+ (top in the country), Business Administration is A, and Statistics is A-, with outstanding strength in finance and economics disciplines; majors like Statistics and Finance have strong appeal to science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of finance/finance and economics/economics majors is divided and wait-and-see, while computer/electronic information majors continue to be highly recommended; in 2026, the number of physics category candidates in the province is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition; Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, a major finance and economics hub in the west, with some regional appeal to Shaanxi candidates. Considering the trend of historical ranking fluctuations and stabilization, the substantial expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+46%) far exceeding the increase in provincial physics category candidates (+19.7%), resulting in a net easing of competition, and the stable appeal of finance and economics disciplines to science candidates, the ranking is expected to move forward (decrease in number) based on the 2025 baseline of 11374; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14310, with a range of 13810–14810.

- Finance (Economics and Management International Innovation Experimental Class)

- Statistics (Statistics, Data Science).

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Business Administration (School of Accounting)
- Management Science and Engineering
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Marketing, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 13810–14810, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<13810), focus on Tier 1 majors like Accounting (CPA direction) and Computer Science and Technology (Top Talent Experimental Class); for rankings close to the upper limit (>14810), mainly choose Tier 3 majors such as Public Finance and Finance.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 925 → 977 → 1040 → 1534 → 1768, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 843 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1768; the provincial liberal arts group plan was 14 people in 2020-2021 → 16 in 2022 → 20 in 2023 → 24 in 2024 → 24 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 26 people, a slight expansion of about 8.3% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition but with limited effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 66th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in the 65–76 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier financial institutions; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative events; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 92nd, with average evaluation, and short video exposure is at a mid-level, showing no clear signs of increased application attention; Applied Economics is A+ (top in the country), Business Administration is A, Statistics is A-, with strong financial and economic disciplines, which have a strong appeal to liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of finance/economics/economic majors in 2024 is differentiated and wait-and-see, overall stable but differentiated; the number of history category candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 88,500, an increase of about 16.9% compared to 75,641 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, a major financial hub in the west, which has a certain regional appeal to Shaanxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+8.3%), and the net competition intensification effect of a significant increase in provincial history category candidates (+16.9%), along with the stable appeal of the school's advantageous financial and economic disciplines to liberal arts students, the ranking is expected to continue to shift backward based on the 2025 baseline of 1768; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1886, with a range of 1547–2225.
